scripts.preview:dev: pulumi stack select dev --create && pulumi preview
scripts.preview:stage: pulumi stack select stage --create && pulumi preview
scripts.preview:prod: pulumi stack select prod --create && pulumi preview
scripts.up:dev: pulumi stack select dev --create && pulumi up --yes
scripts.up:stage: pulumi stack select stage --create && pulumi up --yes
scripts.up:prod: pulumi stack select prod --create && pulumi up --yes
